title: Buggy’s Crew Tightens Its Grip
description: On pages 5–8, this part raises the stakes in Orange Town as Buggy’s weapon and crew threaten the town directly.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PARTNER? She's not my partner!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: NOT ANYMORE, EH? CAN'T BLAME YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: SHE BETRAYED YOU, AFTER ALL!?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: THE PUNISHMENT FOR TRYING TO STEAL MY TREASURE IS SEVERE!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: I'VE ALREADY DECIDED WHAT YOURFATE SHALL BE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ARE YOU GONNA LET ME GO?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: That's right, I'm going to let you go--

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Of course I'm not going to let you go!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: load the special buggy balls!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Hooray!!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: BUGGY BALL READY, CAP'N!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Very well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NOW FOR A DEMON- STRATION... OF POWER!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BREATHING! That would have lovely a smaller town!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WITH THESE BUGGY BALS-- (And the special powers I got from eating the Devil Fruit--I'll rule the Grand Line!!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: Now it's your turn, GIRLIE!!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: PROVE YOUR LOYALTY BY BLOWING YOUR FORMER BOSS INTO MINCEMEAT WITH THIS BUGGY BALL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Show me you're ruthless enough to help me take over the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kill your former boss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: YOU WANT ME TO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...K-KILL HIM?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: TH-THAT'S OKAY, CAPTAIN BUGGY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't need to do that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, let's just drink some more instead!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's forget about that loser!!

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
